title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s Wedding Was Officiated by Adam Sandler
summary: The couple married on the evening of July 3.
body: It’s a love story, baby, and they just said yes with friend Adam Sandler leading the ceremony! Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce exchanged vows at the world famous Madison Square Garden in New York City on Friday (July 3) with the actor-comedian as their officiant, according to a statement the pop superstar’s rep shared with Billboard . Related A Timeline of Taylor Swift & Travis Kelce’s Relationship Taylor Swift & Travis Kelce Are Married Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s Star-Studded Wedding Guests Arrive at MSG Ahead of Ceremony While they had an A-list guest list, none of the bride and groom’s famous friends were part of their wedding party. Instead, the statement reveals that Swift’s brother, Austin, was her man of honor, while the Kansas City Chiefs tight end had brother Jason by his side as his best man. As for their wedding looks — which had not yet been revealed as of press time, the statement shared that the outfits were created by Christian Dior Haute Couture and designed by Jonathan Anderson, who is the creative director of Dior Women’s, Men’s and Haute Couture Collections, with Swift and Kelce collaborating wi…

title: Taylor Swift & Travis Kelce Are Married
summary: The couple tied the knot at Madison Square Garden in New York City.
body: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have finally tied the knot on their love story, getting married in front of friends and family at Madison Square Garden in New York City on Friday (July 3). A sign, which MSG shared a photo of on Instagram , outside of the world-famous venue confirmed they had exchanged their vows. “JUST&T MARRIED!” read the black text over pink background. Swift’s rep also confirmed the happy news in a press release, revealing that the pop superstar and football player wore outfits designed by Christian Dior Haute Couture. The couple did not have traditional bridesmaids or groomsmen, but Swift’s brother Austin was her man of honor, while Jason Kelce was Travis’ best man, the release revealed. Actor-comedian Adam Sandler officiated the nuptials. View this post on Instagram The couple’s nuptials come a little less than a year after they announced their engagement following two years of dating. In August 2025, they shared photos on Instagram from the Kansas City Chiefs tight end’s flower-garden proposal — as well as Swift’s massive diamond ring — and wrote adorably, “Your English teacher and your gym teacher are …

title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s Star-Studded Wedding Guests Arrive at MSG Ahead of Ceremony
summary: Ed Sheeran, Camila Cabello, Jack Antonoff and more celebs arrived in New York City ahead of the couple's July 3 wedding.
body: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce ‘s star-studded guest list is arriving in New York City ahead of the couple’s highly anticipated wedding ceremony. As anticipation builds for the nuptials, dozens of celebrities were spotted making their way to Madison Square Garden, where the pop superstar and Kansas City Chiefs tight end are expected to tie the knot on Friday (July 3). Related Taylor Swift & Travis Kelce’s Wedding Schedule Revealed in City Permit Taylor Swift & Travis Kelce Thanked by More Than a Dozen Charities Following $26 Million Pre-Wedding Donation: ‘Kindness Never Goes Out of Style’ Zohran Mamdani Jokes About Taylor Swift & Travis Kelce’s Wedding Ahead of NYC Heat Wave Among those seen arriving were Swift’s longtime collaborator Jack Antonoff , the singer’s best friend Abigail Anderson, and close friend Gigi Hadid, who attended with boyfriend Bradley Cooper. Dakota Johnson and Mariska Hargitay were also spotted heading to the iconic venue, according to People . Ed Sheeran and his wife, Cherry Seaborn, were also seen before the celebration, while Lena Dunham and the Haim sisters made their way to the ve…
